reviews.comment:
Pésima atención en la tienda. Se te quedan mirando desde atrás de la barra cuando estás en la mesa y ni siquiera son capaces de devolverte un saludo. Irrespetuosos totales (turno noche).

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service in the store. They stare at you from behind the bar when you're at your table and don't even bother to say hello. Completely disrespectful (night shift).

reviews.comment:
Muy buen parador sobre ruta 7. Tienen varios servicios gratuitos como agua caliente, aire para neumático, control de agua y aceite. Cuentan con servicio de comidas al paso y opciones saludables. El baño de mujeres estaba impecable.

(Translated by Google)
A very good rest stop on Route 7. They offer several free services such as hot water, tire inflation, and oil and water checks. They also have a food service with healthy options. The women's restroom was spotless.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNUbU9XSFVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy linda estacion. Algo de reminiscencia de otros tiempos. No tan moderna pero realmente con espíritu como debe ser. Felicitaciones a los que hacen esa YPF.

(Translated by Google)
A very nice station. It's somewhat reminiscent of times gone by. Not quite modern, but still with the spirit it should have. Congratulations to those who built this YPF station.
